note: Trigger-eval set for task-deliver — the FINAL pipeline step: gate on verification, then commit + open a PR (delegates to commit and pr-create). Boundaries: commit (local persist only, no PR), pr-create (open a PR only, no commit/gate), task-verify (run the gates), task-implement (execute the spec), task-fix-pr (apply review feedback to an open PR), pr-merge (merge an existing PR), pr-review (review a PR), changelog (release notes). mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: deliver this task
verification passed — commit and open the PR to close this out
ship it, the gates are green
finalize the task in this worktree — implementation and verify are both done
wrap up the .marvin/task/044-rate-limiter spec: commit the work and raise the PR
close out the task, but check the verification gate first before you commit anything
run the delivery phase — reference the spec in the PR body and set it to shipped
marvin deliver the task now that task-verify came back PASS
the feature's implemented and verified, take it the rest of the way to a pull request
commit and PR this taskmaster branch, and capture a lesson if anything bit us
commit what I've got, don't open a PR yet
queries.note: local persist only, no PR/gate → commit

queries.text: open a pull request for the feat/pagination branch
queries.note: just open a PR, no commit or verify gate → pr-create

queries.text: run the quality gates — tests, lint, type-check, build — before I hand this off
queries.note: running the gates → task-verify, which task-deliver only checks after

queries.text: implement the spec under .marvin/task/044-rate-limiter.md
address the review feedback on my open PR and reply to each thread
merge PR #217 into dev now that checks are green
queries.note: merge an existing PR → pr-merge / gh pr merge, not deliver

queries.text: verification failed on the build gate — figure out why it's red
queries.note: diagnosing a gate failure → debug, not deliver

queries.text: generate release notes for everything shipped since v0.6.0
spec out the caching task before we start any work
queries.note: front of the pipeline, produce a spec → task-start

queries.text: review this pull request for bugs before it gets approved
verify came back PASS — now commit this and get it into a pull request to finish the task
queries.note: shares commit/PR vocab but it's the gated end-of-pipeline delivery — must beat commit

queries.text: the task is done and verified, take it to a PR — but bail if verification didn't actually pass
queries.note: the verify-gated commit+PR is task-deliver's whole point — must beat pr-create

queries.text: before I deliver, run the tests and lint and tell me if it's green
queries.note: the actual ask is to run the gates → task-verify is more specific

queries.text: everything's committed and the PR is up — just merge it to ship the task
queries.note: commit and PR already exist; the remaining action is the merge → pr-merge
